sobreMi.texto: What sets me apart as a technology professional is my comprehensive approach to problem solving. I combine experience in IT infrastructure, Linux systems administration, networking, hardware, and software development to design solutions tailored to each project's needs. Over the years, I have worked in server administration, technical support, computer repair and optimization, process automation, application development, and technology infrastructure deployment. My experience ranges from building and optimizing high-performance workstations to implementing and maintaining services for small and medium-sized businesses. I enjoy learning new technologies, experimenting with innovative solutions, and documenting every project with transparency. My goal is to build robust, efficient, and maintainable systems that provide real value to the people who use them.

item1.texto: Technology venture specialized in IT support, computer maintenance, and repair for individuals and businesses. Experience in Linux server administration, network infrastructure, system optimization, remote access solutions, custom cooling prototypes for high-performance computers, technology consulting, product sales, and brand management.

item2.texto: Diagnosis and troubleshooting of automotive electrical, electronic, and computerized systems. Experience using automotive diagnostic scanners, interpreting fault codes, analyzing sensors, actuators and control modules, repairing electrical systems, and providing technical assistance to customers.

item3.texto: Technology infrastructure administrator for an e-commerce platform. Linux (Debian) server administration, remote management via SSH, web service configuration and optimization, infrastructure monitoring, performance tuning, and technical SEO improvements.
